description_long: This is a pair of ornate scissors featuring two large, circular finger loops connected to intricately curved handles with a reddish metallic finish. The handles are symmetrical and display decorative scrollwork, giving the scissors a vintage or antique appearance. The blades are slender, metallic, and sharply pointed, joined at the center by a visible round rivet or screw. The cutting edges are smooth and straight, designed for precision work. The overall construction suggests a lightweight yet sturdy tool, likely used for fine cutting tasks such as embroidery or crafts. No visible brand markings or logos are present on the surface.
description: Ornate, vintage-style scissors with large circular handles, decorative scrollwork, and sharp pointed blades joined by a central rivet.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large circular handles and the open, pointed blades with the central joint clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the handles, the scrollwork, and the thinness of the blades.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetry of the handles and the full length of the open blades.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the ornate handle design and the sharp, pointed blade tips.
attribute_handle_type: Symmetrical, circular, uncoated metal handles with decorative scrollwork; ambidextrous and not ergonomically contoured.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Visible central rivet joint; not adjustable, standard fixed pivot.
attribute_finger_loop_design: Two large, equal-sized circular loops with smooth surfaces and no inserts or anatomical contours; accommodates multiple finger sizes.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Sharp, pointed blade tips designed for precision cutting.
